fix: match telegram triggers by bot token and fix concurrent polling (#117)

* fix: match telegram triggers by bot token and fix concurrent polling

- TriggerResolver now matches telegram events by bot_token against the
  trigger node's credential, so each bot routes to the correct workflow
- Clean up stale finished jobs before re-enqueueing poll jobs to prevent
  duplicate polling of the same credential
- Use telegram worker-pool (n=2) for concurrent credential polling
- Increase workflow worker pool from n=2 to n=4

- Log debug message on stale job cleanup instead of bare except pass

  the trigger matching loop

repository.name: Pipelit
repository.description: Pipelit is a self-hosted workflow automation platform for designing LLM agent pipelines on a drag-and-drop canvas. Wire up triggers, agents, tools, and routing logic — then watch them execute in real time with live WebSocket status updates on every node.

commit.message:
feat: add dependency checking and multi-pass loop-back to orchestrator (#455)

Stories blocked by unfinished dependencies are now deferred instead of
started immediately. After each pass completes, the orchestrator loops
back to retry dep-blocked stories whose dependencies may have finished.

- parse_story_dependencies() reads Depends On from stories.index.md
- check_deps_satisfied() checks result files and state for UAT/ok
- Multi-pass execution with --max-passes safety limit (default 10)
- Dry-run shows "(blocked by: ...)" for dep-blocked stories
- Stuck detection exits cleanly when no progress is possible

commit.message:
restore nba now page after accidental deletion (#75)

* Full codebase refactor: shared layout, dedup, security, a11y, SEO, perf

Architecture:
- BaseLayout.astro: shared HTML boilerplate for all 12 pages (meta, OG, fonts, JSON-LD)
- sportsCore.ts: shared ESPN types, ranking helpers, fetch loop, DOM utils
- sports.css: shared structural CSS for NBA Now + MLB GameRank

Code quality:
- Remove 1,451 lines of duplication, add 607 lines of shared infrastructure
- Type mlbGameRank.ts with proper interfaces (was 40+ uses of `any`)
- Delete 7 orphaned screenshot PNGs (~630KB)
- Remove dead code: unused .glass CSS, .broadcast-badge.local, screenshot fields

Security:
- Fix XSS in nearest-coffee/fun renderError() — escape title/message params
- Add JSON.parse error handling in recommend.ts (502 for malformed AI response)
- Wrap localStorage.setItem in try/catch in idea-shuffler (private browsing)

Accessibility:
- Add noscript fallback for homepage card visibility
- Add role="img" + aria-label to pixel-aquarium canvas
- Add aria-hidden to decorative SVG icons
- Add prefers-reduced-motion to nba-now, mlb-gamerank, idea-shuffler

SEO:
- Add robots.txt with sitemap reference
- Install @astrojs/sitemap for auto-generated sitemap.xml
- Complete manifest.json with proper PWA fields

Performance:
- Skip ESPN polling when tab is hidden (Page Visibility API)
- Skip pixel-aquarium game loop when tab is hidden
- Cache DOM element references in pixel-aquarium (was getElementById per frame)

feat: health-check automático + comando db:restore

- db:health-check: corre cada 15 min, detecta businesses=0 vs snapshot
  previo → auto-restaura desde el backup más reciente + loguea crítico
- db:restore: restaura manualmente desde el backup más reciente (o uno
  específico con --backup=), crea backup de seguridad pre-restore
- Ambos comandos registrados en el scheduler de Kernel.php

Protección para entorno dev+prod compartido: si un borrado accidental
vacía la tabla businesses, el sistema se recupera solo en ≤15 minutos.

commit.message:
Add Read and Edit hook scripts for proactive context injection

PreToolUse:Read hook runs memstore list-file and eval-triggers on each
file read, injecting learned facts and trigger context automatically.

PreToolUse:Edit hook does the same, plus infers a symbol name from the
edit context (Go func/type, Python def/class) for targeted symbol facts.

Both hooks silently exit 0 on any error to never block operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add config file support, eval-triggers command, and store --kind/--subsystem flags

Config file (~/.config/memstore/config.toml) provides persistent defaults
for db, namespace, ollama, model, and gen_model. Both CLI and MCP server
load config at startup; flags override config values. Removes duplicated
defaultDBPath() from both binaries.

New eval-triggers subcommand evaluates kind=trigger facts against a file
path using glob matching (supports *, ?, **) and loads matching subsystem
context. Used by Read/Edit hooks for proactive context injection.

Store command gains --kind and --subsystem flags for direct CLI fact
creation with structural metadata.

commit.message:
fix: Skip <pre> blocks in KaTeX math processing to prevent code block corruption

Dollar-sign delimiters ($$) in SQL/PostgreSQL code blocks were being
matched by KaTeX as math expressions, breaking the rendered HTML structure.

Rosetta on Apple Silicon.

commit.message:
Switch PN532 HAT from SPI to I2C mode

Raspberry Pi OS Bookworm's lgpio backend conflicts with the kernel SPI
driver claiming CE0, causing "GPIO busy" errors. I2C avoids this entirely.

- nfc_interface.py: use PN532_I2C instead of PN532_SPI
- setup.sh: enable I2C instead of SPI, remove spidev from pip install
- README.md: update all hardware setup references to I2C

Also adds sync reminder comment to static/logo.svg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
[minor][feature]: Add more execution flow tag point (#1694)

## PR Title Format

**Required Format:** `[Keyword1] [Keyword2]: Description`

- **Keyword1:** `major`, `minor`, or `patch` (case-insensitive)
- **Keyword2:** `feature`, `bugfix`, `engg`, or `tests`
(case-insensitive)

**Examples:**
- `[MAJOR] [Feature]: new API`
- `[minor] [bugfix]: fix crash`
- `[PATCH][tests]:add coverage`

## Proposed changes


This pull request introduces comprehensive execution flow logging across
multiple controller and request classes in the `IdentityCore` module.
The changes add logging tags at key decision points and completion
blocks, with contextual information such as error codes and correlation
IDs. This enhancement will improve traceability and debugging for silent
and interactive token requests, as well as SSO extension requests.

### Execution flow logging enhancements

* Added `MSIDExecutionFlowLogger` and `MSIDExecutionFlowConstants`
imports to `MSIDRequestControllerFactory.m`,
`MSIDSSORemoteInteractiveTokenRequest.m`, and
`MSIDSSORemoteSilentTokenRequest.m` to enable logging functionality.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R28-R29)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-3ff9a77cf45790833b234f0cda9bf177e4b2a774e0fd65018aae7a4223854da3R40-R41)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-a34cbe47f4e4bad7bc3877ddb4be242c48eecc433875802d4b916261ead46934R40-R41)
* Inserted execution flow logging tags at key points in silent and
interactive controller creation logic, including broker usage checks,
SSO extension checks, XPC mode checks, fallback handling, and controller
completion. Tags include relevant extra info and correlation IDs for
improved traceability.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R53-R55)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R90-R97)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R121-R123)
[[4]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R152-R155)
[[5]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R175-R177)
[[6]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R191-R193)
[[7]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R212-R214)
[[8]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R225-R227)
[[9]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R256-R258)
[[10]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R273-R297)
[[11]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R313-R315)
[[12]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R325-R328)
[[13]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R432-R434)
[[14]](diffhunk://#diff-da918d3c617539935f2aa37a6c19ecc4ab145ef10acbe2f50a6e0220a0e43741R452-R454)

### SSO extension request logging

* Added execution flow logging tags to
`MSIDSSORemoteInteractiveTokenRequest.m` for authority resolution,
operation response handling, and completion blocks, including error
codes and correlation IDs.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-3ff9a77cf45790833b234f0cda9bf177e4b2a774e0fd65018aae7a4223854da3R104-R106)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-3ff9a77cf45790833b234f0cda9bf177e4b2a774e0fd65018aae7a4223854da3R148-R150)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-3ff9a77cf45790833b234f0cda9bf177e4b2a774e0fd65018aae7a4223854da3R165-R167)
* Added execution flow logging tags to
`MSIDSSORemoteSilentTokenRequest.m` for operation response handling and
completion blocks, including error codes and correlation IDs.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-a34cbe47f4e4bad7bc3877ddb4be242c48eecc433875802d4b916261ead46934R106-R108)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-a34cbe47f4e4bad7bc3877ddb4be242c48eecc433875802d4b916261ead46934R122-R124)

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature work
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Engineering change
- [ ] Test
- [x] Logging/Telemetry

## Risk

- [ ] High – Errors could cause MAJOR regression of many scenarios.
(Example: new large features or high level infrastructure changes)
- [ ] Medium – Errors could cause regression of 1 or more scenarios.
(Example: somewhat complex bug fixes, small new features)
- [x] Small – No issues are expected. (Example: Very small bug fixes,
string changes, or configuration settings changes)

## Additional information


[AB#3407672](https://identitydivision.visualstudio.com/fac9d424-53d2-45c0-91b5-ef6ba7a6bf26/_workitems/edit/3407672)

commit.message:
Harden sidecar for Railway + price bar: target vs lowest offer

Part 1 — Sidecar reliability:
- Force UTF-8 stdout/stderr at top of pingpong_server.py
- Wrap all imports in try/except with clear [pingpong_server] log prefix
- Add error handling around load_kb(), OpenAI client, step_once()
- Sidecar runs in stub mode if imports fail (health check still passes)
- Procfile: redirect sidecar stderr to stdout (2>&1)

Part 2 — Price journey bar:
- Change from "시장가→목표가 진행률" to "목표가 대비 최저오퍼 도달률"
- No offers: 0%, shows "오퍼 대기 중"
- Offer <= target: 100%, shows "목표가 달성!"
- Offer > target: proportional progress
- Labels: "최저 오퍼" ↔ "목표가" (was 시장가 ↔ 목표가)

Verified: sidecar returns engine=sidecar, 259 chars natural Korean.

commit.message:
docs: add postmortem for 2026-03-04 Cloud Run deploy failure

Recurring DATABASE_URL mismatch (Cloud SQL vs Supabase). Resolved by
completing the Cloud SQL migration: created tables in auth schema,
migrated data, and fixed search_path in the connection string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rewrite ETL to use psycopg2 direct (100x faster), fix 10 data bugs

Major changes:
- Replace Supabase REST API with psycopg2 execute_values() for ~100x speedup
- Use session_replication_role=replica to disable FK triggers during load
- Fix is_extras_status.visivel: was boolean, schema expects integer
- Fix is_mkt_cupons.tipo: was integer, schema expects varchar
- Fix is_producao_setores/is_pedidos_itens.status: varchar not integer
- Fix is_pedidos_pagamentos.visto: boolean not integer
- Fix is_produtos.valor: varchar not decimal
- Fix is_financeiro_lancamentos.valor: enforce CHECK(>=0) via to_money
- Fix is_mkt_cupons_produtos: handle composite PK (no id column)
- Fix is_clientes_enderecos: remove is_principal from mapping (not in MySQL)
- Increase batch_size 200->2000, timeout 90->180 min
- Add TABLE_TYPE_OVERRIDES for per-table column type fixes
- Batch 2-pass self-ref updates via execute_batch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Playwright Dockerfile — install system deps manually for Trixie

ttf-unifont and ttf-ubuntu-font-family don't exist on Debian Trixie.
Install Chromium's required system libs explicitly and use fonts-unifont
(the Trixie replacement). Use `playwright install chromium` without
--with-deps to avoid the broken package list.
